description: Using the open food.gdt dataset containing household survey data for 'food_exp' (weekly food expenditure) and 'income' (weekly income), conduct White's test for heteroskedasticity on an OLS regression of 'food_exp' on 'income'. Save the test output to /home/ga/Documents/gretl_output/white_test_results.txt.

metadata.data_source: Hill, Griffiths, Lim - Principles of Econometrics 5th ed, household survey data
